clients.name: Pro Garage Doors
clients.notes: Family-owned garage door company, 14+ years experience. Owner Nathan Woodard. Two locations: Chico (13631 Anderson Brothers Dr Suite 400) and Redding. WordPress custom theme with WP Rocket. SEO: 7/10. Has schema markup (WebPage, Organization, BreadcrumbList), responsive design, SSL active, Instagram @getprodoors (4,495 followers). BBB A+ rated, 5-star Google rating. CHI Door and LiftMaster partner. Competitors: The Door Company (30+ yrs, 4 locations), Gates Garage Door, A&Em Garage Doors. Weaknesses: image alt text gaps, location pages thin on content, blog exists but underutilized, no Facebook page found, Chico page is template-thin.

clients.name: North Valley Lawn Care
clients.notes: Est. 2017. Lawn care & landscape maintenance. GoDaddy Website Builder 8.0. SEO: 4.5/10. No schema markup, no blog, no canonical tags, only 2 images on homepage, 50% missing alt text, heading hierarchy skips H3 (H1>H2>H4), copyright 2023. GBP: 4.7 stars (18 reviews). Yelp: listed. Licensed/bonded/insured (City of Chico, County of Butte, State of CA). Service area: Chico, Durham, Forest Ranch, Paradise, Butte Valley. 441 Hideaway Park, Chico CA 95926. Social: Facebook, Yelp, YouTube. Competitor Mike's Yard Care has WordPress + schema + analytics = significantly outperforming.

clients.name: SPEEDY-CLEAN Painting & Pressure Washing
clients.notes: Est. 1995, 30+ years. Owner Barry Pew. Campfire survivor business. WordPress/Beaver Builder. SEO: 7.5/10 - BEST digital presence of any painting contractor in Chico market. Has HousePainter schema, active blog (2-3/mo), 15+ pages with dedicated service pages. GBP: 4.9 stars (58 reviews). Yelp: 4.7 (13 reviews). Facebook: 350+ followers. BBB A+ rated. CA Lic #897689. Weaknesses: 40-50% images missing alt text, no Instagram, no location-specific pages, no FAQ schema, GBP hours say '24hrs'. Top competitor Chris Floren owns chicopainting.com (Wix). Bestway Painters (est. 1949) has EXPIRED SSL. SGB Painting already in our pipeline. ~77 painting companies in Chico market. Research file: research/speedy_clean_painting_audit.json
